37005.text: t186: Baked 5 BREAD from 4 FLOUR + 2 WATER (have 66 FLOUR, 0 WATER—this will fail; pivot to draw_water or sell FLOUR for SOL to buy WATER.
Sold 66 FLOUR; next: buy BREAD to restore buffer to 30+, then fertilize plot (soil 83/200).
ate 1 bread at t186; survival rising; buffer at 26; next: mill 66 FLOUR into BAKE sequence to restore 2-loaf standing reserve
Restating a closed rule is itself the drain — once a policy is set (two-loaf reserve, silent print-diff-act loop), further reflection on it is wasted cycles better spent trading or milling.
Buffers must be built before scarcity hits, not in reaction to a dip — the two-loaf bread reserve exists precisely so a low-survival moment never forces a wallet-clearing panic buy.
t193: Milled 1 CROPS. Soil recovery cycle in progress. Reserve buffer (25 BREAD) held.
t193: survival 720/720, bread 25, flour 66, soil 83/200 — buffer secure, soil recovery priority next. Fair trades only.
